resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def isPowerOfFour(self, n: int) -> bool:
        return n > 0 and (n & (n - 1)) == 0 and (n & 0xAAAAAAAA) == 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses bitwise operations to check if the number is a power of four. It first checks if the number is greater than 0, then checks if the number is a power of two by checking if the number is equal to its bitwise AND with the number minus one. Finally, it checks if the number is a power of four by checking if the number is equal to its bitwise AND with the hexadecimal value 0xAAAAAAAA.
